title: The Old Net - Retro Internet Nostalgia
description: A collection of links to the old, small, independent web. GeoCities-era pages, personal sites, and internet nostalgia.
author: Altivec
content:
The Old Net - Remembering GeoCities

A curated collection of the old, quirky, personal internet. Before algorithms and engagement metrics, people built weird and wonderful personal websites.

What You'll Find

Links to archived personal pages, fan sites, shrines, and oddities from the '90s and 2000s. All still accessible and browsable.

Explore

Visit theoldnet.com and step into internet history.
